title: Business Breakfast | Stock Market News | May 20, 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Earlier 'dark horse'; hold long-term
recommendations.detail: He had flagged it earlier as a dark horse and it performed reasonably well. Even in a volatile market it held above 40. Presently you can hold; it was a long-term pick.

recommendations.note: Good bank-space stock; add carefully, no hurry
recommendations.detail: He said you can add but there is no hurry since the market is weak and may fall further. It is a good stock in the banking space; watch the entry point carefully.

recommendations.note: Good stock; add carefully, no hurry
recommendations.detail: He said all three of the caller's stocks are good and you can add, but there is no hurry given market weakness. Buy but watch the entry point carefully.

recommendations.note: Start slowly near 900, no rush
recommendations.detail: Definitely start slowly but with no rush. The broader market will be weak and bank stocks usually suffer in higher inflation. After it comes close to 900, start accumulating SBI slowly.

recommendations.note: Hold if already bought; no fresh buy now
recommendations.detail: If already bought, hold. But fresh buying immediately is not necessary.

recommendations.note: Exit on rallies; Delhi-centric, litigation
recommendations.detail: Exit on rallies. It is not a pan-India hotel chain, only Delhi-centric (Asian Hotels North). It already ran to about 400 and is forming lower tops and lower bottoms, with news-driven activity and a litigation on the hotel's shopping arcade. Sell around 320 to 330; you should exit this counter.

recommendations.note: Hold; correction likely short, can rebound
recommendations.detail: Hold; all power companies irrespective of short-term performance he says hold. Decent Gujarat-based large group. It corrected modestly from around 1,800 to the support level near 1,450 on a weak result, but the correction is likely short and it could jump again. Don't sell at this level.

recommendations.note: Hold with SL ~1500; richly valued PE ~90
recommendations.detail: Caller bought near the peak (~2,000) after a ~1,000 rise in a month. Hold with a stop-loss around 1,500; if the stock rebounds, exit close to his price. It is a good stock without doubt but very richly valued at about PE 90.

recommendations.note: Buy only below 900; treated as pure-AI play
recommendations.detail: Fancy could come and many treat it as a pure-AI company. He said it would be a good bet only below 900.

recommendations.note: Hold; no fresh buying, exit on rallies
recommendations.detail: If you ask him, just hold; no fresh buying and exit on rallies. It stood strong and some buying comes in the counter at lower levels. If you have it, hold.

recommendations.note: Infra space could rebound; hold
recommendations.detail: Overall the infra space could see a rebound, there is a possibility, so he said hold.

recommendations.note: Very weak; exit on rallies
recommendations.detail: Morepen is very weak. He said exit on rallies.

recommendations.note: Exit; jewelry best-of-times over, can fall
recommendations.detail: He thinks jewelry companies have seen the best of times. Near a recession, even if margins are protected, sales improvement may not come. If you ask him, exit, because the stock can go down to 3,600 to 3,700 in the next one to two months.

recommendations.note: Avoid; near 52-wk low, margins weak
recommendations.detail: Good debt-free result but top line grew while bottom line and margins did not, so the stock did not rise and is near its 52-week low. He would not invest; the fintech field is competitive and unless they upgrade services the stock is hard to sustain. If already bought put a 200 stop-loss, else exit on rallies at 240 to 250.

recommendations.note: Hold if held; no fresh buy, fully priced
recommendations.detail: One of the larger, near-monopoly players in wheels, but now fully priced and the overall market is dull. If you have bought the stock, hold; fresh buying, no.

recommendations.note: Operated counter, PE ~100; would not buy
recommendations.detail: More of an operated/event-driven counter than a fundamental one; one should only hold if you follow the news regularly. It was once a penny stock and now trades close to 200 at about PE 100. He would not buy.

recommendations.note: Branded, low-cost maker; hold
recommendations.detail: A company with branding and good prospects, one of the lowest-cost cable manufacturers, though the industry is a bit dull for now. He says hold.

recommendations.note: Weak numbers; avoid amid volatile crude
recommendations.detail: Numbers came yesterday and were weak. For now, avoid. With volatile crude prices it is doubtful HPCL can perform.

recommendations.note: Margins down, spreads to fall; near 52-wk low
recommendations.detail: Margins fell a lot and a regulator order will compress their spreads further from the coming year. Despite higher volumes the stock trades near its 52-week low. He would avoid.

recommendations.note: Wait and watch; treasury-loss risk on yields
recommendations.detail: As of now, wait and watch. As yields rise, treasury losses for banks could also rise going forward.

recommendations.note: Short-term weak but can rebound; hold
recommendations.detail: Hold. Only because of short-term concerns there is a bit of weakness, but it can rebound. On the rebound, when it comes close to the caller's price, exit.
